You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.
For example:
> open cupboard

You can have up to two objects in your inventory at the same time.

Your goal for this game is to brew a potion following the potion recipe.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

Magical experiments have reversed and dampened gravity in this room. You begin to float in the air.
> go to kitchen

You are in a kitchen now. There are a cupboard, a bucket of water, a plate, a ice wand, a water, a counter, a cauldron and a fairy wand. The cupboard is open. The bucket of water is on the floor. The plate is on the floor. The ice wand is on the floor. The water is in the cauldron. The cauldron is on the floor. The fairy wand is on the floor. There are passages to a conservatory and a pantry here.
Gravity behaves normally in this room. You stop floating in the air.
> put red beetle into cauldron

You put the red beetle into the cauldron.
The red beetle absorbs into the water with a gloopy sound producing a liquid in the cauldron.
> take fairy wand
You take the fairy wand. In your inventory you have a spiderweb and a fairy wand.
> wiggle fairy wand on cauldron

You wave the fairy wand at the cauldron.
The liquid in the glittery cauldron sloshes with a gloopy sound.
> drop fairy wand
You drop the fairy wand on the floor.
> take ice wand
You take the ice wand. In your inventory you have a spiderweb and a ice wand.
> wiggle ice wand over cauldron

You wave the ice wand at the cauldron.
The liquid in the cold cauldron whistles with a puff of vapor.
> put spiderweb into cauldron

You put the spiderweb into the cauldron.
The spiderweb combines with the liquid in the cauldron with a pop.
> go to pantry

You are in a pantry now. There are a eye of newt, a orange, a sandwich, a ice box, a apple, a ingredient rack, a peach, a banana and a toad. The eye of newt is on the floor. The orange is in the ice box. The sandwich is in the ice box. The ice box is closed. The apple is in the ice box. The peach is in the ice box. The banana is in the ice box. The toad is in the ice box. There is a passage to a kitchen here.
> open ice box
The ice box is now open. In the ice box there are a sandwich, a apple, a orange, a banana, a peach and a toad.
> take sandwich
You take the sandwich. In your inventory you have a ice wand and a sandwich.
> go to kitchen

You are in a kitchen now. There are a cupboard, a bucket of water, a liquid, a plate, a counter, a cauldron and a fairy wand. The cupboard is open. The bucket of water is on the floor. The liquid is in the cauldron. The plate is on the floor. The cauldron is on the floor. The fairy wand is on the floor. There are passages to a conservatory and a pantry here.

The sandwich absorbs into the liquid with a phase shift leaving the finished potion in the cauldron.
